name: Cloudflare Spectrum Glossary
description: Definitions for terms used across Cloudflare Spectrum documentation.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct — Cloudflare is a CDN/security platform; product-specific terminology applies to cloud-security contexts.
relationToAISecurity: Varies by product; AI Gateway / Workers AI / AI Crawl Control / AI Search entries are AI-relevant by definition.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. License prohibits public redistribution; the structured extraction is held in the private dataset companion repo (dataset-private-laws-regulations-standards) and exposed only via the planned authenticated SecID resolver.

extraction_history.reason: Stub created on the public side to mirror the private-repo structured extraction. Discovered via developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt index, 2026-05-21.

notes: Mirror-stub for a Cloudflare developer-docs per-product glossary documented in PROCESSING-GLOSSARIES.md (dataset-private repo). Public-side metadata only; no term content held here.
